briefing: Markets were neutral to slightly negative today (NASDAQ -0.9%, S&P 500 -0.3%), not a strong risk-on setup, so we made one measured buy in our top-scoring candidate rather than fully deploying the open cash across all four available slots.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing means buying stocks that are already showing upward price and indicator trends (like RSI in a healthy bullish range and MACD crossovers), betting that the trend continues in the near term. It works best when confirmed by multiple signals together, since any single indicator alone can give false signals.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資是指買入價格與技術指標已經呈現上升趨勢的股票（例如RSI處於健康的多頭區間、MACD出現黃金交叉），賭這股趨勢會在短期內延續。當多個訊號同時確認時效果最好，因為單一指標很容易出現假訊號。

market_education.summary_en: Broader indices drifted lower today with NASDAQ down 0.9% and the S&P 500 down 0.3%, reflecting a generally cautious, directionless session rather than a sharp risk-off move. Despite the soft tape, several individual names like LRN, GT, and ARCB showed strong bullish technical setups, showing that stock-specific momentum can diverge from index-level weakness. This kind of environment calls for selective stock picking rather than broad market timing.
market_education.summary_zh: 大盤今日整體走弱，納斯達克指數下跌0.9%，標普500指數下跌0.3%，屬於方向不明的觀望格局，而非急速的風險規避賣壓。儘管大盤疲弱，個別股票如LRN、GT、ARCB仍展現強勁的技術面買進訊號，顯示個股動能可以與大盤走勢脫鉤。這種環境更適合精選個股，而非單純追蹤大盤方向進場。

trades.reasoning: Strong multi-signal confirmation (RSI 60.7 bullish zone, MACD bullish crossover, rising histogram, price above SMA-20) makes it the top candidate despite a neutral/slightly negative broader market.
